description: In this episode, Anatoly interviews Jonathan Shamul, founder of Aleph.im, discussing his journey into crypto, the development of Aleph IM, and the need for decentralized infrastructure in Web3.
topic_summary: Jonathan Shamul shares his background in crypto development, the inception of Aleph IM, and the importance of decentralizing the last mile of blockchain applications, particularly in relation to AWS dependencies [t=169.55].
